name: audio2afan
description: Audio-driven facial animation for VRM — convert audio to ARKit blendshapes

scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import{Audio2FaceCore}from'./src/core.mjs';import{AnimationWriter,AnimationReader,ARKIT_NAMES}from'./src/animation.mjs';import{Audio2FaceSDK}from'./src/index.mjs';import assert from'node:assert/strict';import fs from'fs';const T=class{constructor(t,d,s){this.type=t;this.data=d;this.dims=s}};const o={Tensor:T};const ms=()=>({inputNames:['audio','emotion'],outputNames:['output'],run:async()=>({output:{data:new Float32Array(200).fill(0.1)}}),release:()=>{}});let p=0,f=0;async function t(n,fn){try{await fn();p++}catch(e){f++;console.error('FAIL:',n,e.message)}}await t('core-defaults',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});assert.equal(c.sampleRate,16000);assert.equal(c.bufferLen,8320)});await t('core-config',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.loadConfig(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('config.json','utf8')));assert.equal(c.smoothingUpper,0.001);assert.equal(c.skinSize,140)});await t('core-emotions',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.setEmotion('joy',0.8);assert.ok(Math.abs(c.emotionVector[6]-0.8)<0.001);assert.throws(()=>c.setEmotion('x',0),/Unknown/)});await t('core-smoothing',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.smoothingUpper=0.5;const r=c.smoothBlendshapes([{name:'a',value:1}],[{name:'a',value:0}]);assert.equal(r[0].value,0.5)});await t('core-ring',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c._ringAppend(new Float32Array([1,2,3]));assert.equal(c._ringLen,3);c._ringConsume(2);assert.equal(c._ring[0],3)});await t('core-resample',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});const r=c.resampleAudio(new Float32Array([0,1,0]),16000,32000);assert.equal(r.length,6)});await t('core-empty',()=>{const r=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o}).getEmptyResult();assert.equal(r.blendshapes.length,52)});await t('core-parse',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.session=ms();c._initTensorCache();const out={output:{data:new Float32Array(200)}};out.output.data[0]=5;const r=c.parseOutputs(out);assert.equal(r.blendshapes.length,52);assert.ok(r.blendshapes[0].value>0.5)});await t('core-process',async()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.session=ms();const r=await c.processAudioChunk(new Float32Array(c.bufferLen+100));assert.equal(r.blendshapes.length,52)});await t('core-dispose',()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.session={release:()=>{}};c.dispose();assert.equal(c.session,null)});await t('anim-roundtrip',()=>{const w=new AnimationWriter({fps:30});w.processResult({blendshapes:ARKIT_NAMES.map(n=>({name:n,value:0.5}))},w.samplesPerFrame);const b=w.toBuffer();assert.equal(b.readUInt32LE(0),0x4146414E);const r=new AnimationReader().fromBuffer(b);assert.equal(r.numFrames,1);assert.equal(r.fps,30)});await t('anim-base64',()=>{const w=new AnimationWriter();w.processResult({blendshapes:ARKIT_NAMES.map(n=>({name:n,value:1}))},w.samplesPerFrame);const r=new AnimationReader().fromBase64(w.toBase64());assert.equal(r.frames[0].blendshapes[ARKIT_NAMES[0]],1)});await t('anim-invalid',()=>{const b=Buffer.alloc(12);b.writeUInt32LE(0xDEAD,0);assert.throws(()=>new AnimationReader().fromBuffer(b),/Invalid/)});await t('sdk-extends',()=>{const s=new Audio2FaceSDK();assert.ok(s instanceof Audio2FaceCore);assert.equal(s.actualBackend,null)});await t('sdk-bad-model',async()=>{try{await new Audio2FaceSDK().loadModel(123);assert.fail()}catch(e){assert.ok(e.message.includes('Model must be'))}});await t('e2e-pipeline',async()=>{const c=new Audio2FaceCore({ort:o});c.session=ms();const w=new AnimationWriter({fps:30,sampleRate:16000});const a=new Float32Array(c.bufferLen*3);for(let i=0;i<a.length;i++)a[i]=Math.sin(i*0.01);for(let i=0;i<a.length-c.bufferLen;i+=c.bufferOfs){const r=await c.runInference(a.slice(i,i+c.bufferLen));w.processResult(r,c.bufferOfs)}w.finalize();const r=new AnimationReader().fromBuffer(w.toBuffer());assert.ok(r.numFrames>0)});console.log(p+'/'+String(p+f)+' passed');if(f)process.exit(1)"

author: AnEntrypoint
